description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, reinforced by two dark metal hoops encircling its body. The wood staves are vertically aligned, giving the barrel a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The top surface is flat and currently holds several green apples, with one apple having rolled off and resting on the ground nearby. Scattered straw or hay is visible around the base, suggesting the barrel is stored or used in an area where such material is common. The wood appears weathered but sturdy, and the metal bands provide structural integrity. There are no visible handles, labels, or markings on the exterior.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with metal hoops, topped with green apples and surrounded by scattered straw.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's flat top with three green apples and one apple on the ground amid scattered straw.
description_view_1: Side view with three apples on top and one apple on the ground to the left, straw more concentrated on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view with two apples on top, straw mostly behind the barrel, and no apples on the ground in view.
description_view_3: Side view with three apples on top and one apple on the ground to the right, straw mostly on the right side.
